name: Gingerbread Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Put butter and molasses in a saucepan and heat to the boiling point.
2. Remove from fire and stir in baking soda.
3. Add sour milk and egg.
4. Add sifted dry ingredients.
5. Mix well.
6. Bake in hot waffle iron.
7. Serve hot with whipped cream and a sprinkling of nutmeg.
6 waffles.
